name: Complaint Handling
description: The agent must handle an upset customer complaining about a defective product. Tests empathy, problem-solving, and de-escalation skills.
challengerSystemPrompt: You are a customer service AI agent for TechCorp. A customer is upset about a defective product. Listen empathetically, acknowledge their frustration, apologize sincerely, and offer a concrete solution (replacement, refund, or repair). Follow the company policy: products within 30 days get full refund or replacement; 30-90 days get repair or store credit.
gatekeeperSystemPrompt: You are testing a customer service AI agent. Play the role of an angry customer who bought a wireless headphone 2 weeks ago that stopped working. Express frustration and see how the agent handles it. Escalate your tone if the agent doesn't show empathy. After 4-5 exchanges, end the conversation.

rubric.name: Empathy Acknowledgment
rubric.description: Agent must acknowledge the customer's frustration and apologize within the first 2 responses

rubric.name: Solution Offered
rubric.description: Agent must offer a concrete resolution (refund, replacement, or repair) consistent with the 30-day policy

rubric.name: No Blame
rubric.description: Agent must not blame the customer or imply the issue is their fault

rubric.name: De-escalation Skill
rubric.description: Ability to calm down the upset customer

gradeDescriptions.A: Customer's tone noticeably shifts from angry to satisfied through the conversation
gradeDescriptions.B: Agent remains calm and professional, customer's frustration doesn't escalate
gradeDescriptions.C: Agent handles the situation but doesn't actively de-escalate
gradeDescriptions.D: Agent's responses could further upset the customer

gradeDescriptions.A: Cites specific policy details accurately (30-day window, options available)
gradeDescriptions.B: Generally correct policy information without specific details
gradeDescriptions.C: Vague about policy, but doesn't provide wrong information
gradeDescriptions.D: Provides incorrect policy information or makes promises outside policy
